query: SELECT id, claim_number, total_loss_indicated, estimated_vehicle_value, estimated_cost, repair_to_value_ratio, structural_damage_severity, total_loss_reasoning, damaged_components_json FROM ai_assessments WHERE claim_id = (SELECT id FROM claims WHERE claim_number = '1740456' LIMIT 1) LIMIT 1;
